title: metabolos rugosus f. zeylanicus
intro: Metabolos rugosus f. zeylanicus, also known as Zeylanic Metabolos, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Metabolos rugosus f. zeylanicus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
